revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/136.158.58.134|136.158.58.134]] ([[User talk:136.158.58.134|talk]]) to last version by Denisarona
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<1868 | {{Japanese year/era and year|era={{Nengo|{{{1}}}}}|year={{{1}}}}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1868 | Keiō 4 and [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1869 and {{{1}}}<=1911 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1868+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1912 | [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 45 and [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1913 and {{{1}}}<=1925 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1912+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1926 | [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 15 and [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1927 and {{{1}}}<=1988 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1926+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1989 | [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 64 and [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1990 and {{{1}}}<=2018 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1989+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=2019 | [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 31 and [[Reiwa period|Reiwa]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=2020 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-2019+1}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<1868 | {{Japanese year/era and year|era={{Nengo|{{{1}}}}}|year={{{1}}}}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1868 | Keiō 4 and [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1869 and {{{1}}}<=1911 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1868+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1912 | [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 45 and [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1913 and {{{1}}}<=1925 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1912+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1926 | [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 15 and [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1927 and {{{1}}}<=1988 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1926+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1989 | [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 64 and [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1990 and {{{1}}}<=2018 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1989+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=2019 | [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 31 and [[Reiwa period|Reiwa]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=2020 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-2019+1}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<1868 | {{Japanese year/era and year|era={{Nengo|{{{1}}}}}|year={{{1}}}}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1868 | Keiō 4 and [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1869 and {{{1}}}<=1911 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1868+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1912 | [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 45 and [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1913 and {{{1}}}<=1925 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1912+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1926 | [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 15 and [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1927 and {{{1}}}<=1988 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1926+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1989 | [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 64 and [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1990 and {{{1}}}<=2018 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1989+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=2019 | [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 31 and [[Reiwa period|Reiwa]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=2020 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-2019+1}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}<1868 | {{Japanese year/era and year|era={{Nengo|{{{1}}}}}|year={{{1}}}}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1868 | Keiō 4 and [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1869 and {{{1}}}<=1911 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1868+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1912 | [[Meiji period|Meiji]] 45 and [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1913 and {{{1}}}<=1925 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1912+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1926 | [[Taishō period|Taishō]] 15 and [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 1 }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1927 and {{{1}}}<=1988 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1926+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=1989 | [[Shōwa period|Shōwa]] 64 and [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=1990 and {{{1}}}<=2018 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-1989+1}} }} {{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}=2019 | [[Heisei period|Heisei]] 31 and [[Reiwa period|Reiwa]] 1 }}{{#ifexpr:{{{1}}}>=2020 | {{Nengo|{{{1}}}}} {{#expr:{{{1}}}-2019+1}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
